durable_slice: Convert sanitized deployment blockers into a deterministic, secret-free GitHub environment authorization packet with dispatch and acceptance criteria.

verification.source_behavior: The builder allowlists only CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN as requestable secret names, retains unknown blockers only as remediation entries, and never emits credential values.

limits: C-001 remains externally blocked until the cloudflare-research GitHub environment is authorized.
No deployment, hostname, or served-identity claim is made.
No diagnosis, treatment, or payment functionality was introduced.
rollback: Revert commits e699d99199d001cc0d9d8a407a00995cf7cc7c5a and 136ab652412469f4386dbd179a0711b0b69c0ad1; preserve evidence and queue records as history.
next_action: Integrate the authorization packet builder into the Cloudflare workflow's always-run blocker path, then dispatch only after the environment contains valid Cloudflare credentials.
